name: Chipped Beef Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp GREEN BELL PEPPER FINELY CHOPPED
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, blend together the cream cheese and milk until smooth.
3. Stir in the chipped beef, onions, green bell pepper, black pepper, and sour cream. Mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into a small baking dish and sprinkle the pecans on top.
5. Bake, uncovered, for 20 minutes at 350°F.
6. Serve hot with chips or crackers.
